steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Simplify the left side first:
$$\frac{14x}{7y}=\frac{2x}{y}$$
So the equation becomes
$$\frac{2x}{y}=2\sqrt{w+19}$$

steps.title: Solve for w
steps.content: Square both sides, then subtract $19$: $$(\frac{x}{y})^2=w+19$$ $$w=(\frac{x}{y})^2-19$$ The answer is C.
